Headquartered in London, the firm provides financing to mid-market companies across Europe and North America, offering customised debt structures and flexible capital solutions. It manages strategies across performing credit, syndicated loans, healthcare royalties, and opportunistic investments. Hayfin is known for its conservative risk management, bottom-up credit analysis, and strong institutional relationships. It serves pension funds, insurers, and sovereign wealth clients looking for yield and diversification through private debt exposure.

Name: Investment Banking Internship - May
Company Description: GP Bullhound is an international technology investment bank and asset management firm specialising in growth-stage companies across software, digital media, marketplaces, and fintech. Founded in 1999 and headquartered in London, the firm provides M&A advisory, capital raising, and private investments through its growth equity funds. GP Bullhound operates in major tech hubs including San Francisco, Berlin, Stockholm, and Paris, and is known for its focus on high-growth entrepreneurs and founder-led businesses. Its investment banking arm has advised on some of Europe’s most notable tech transactions, while its asset management division backs fast-scaling companies through Series B and beyond. The firm also publishes highly regarded research on the global technology landscape and is active in hosting thought leadership events. GP Bullhound sits at the intersection of finance and innovation, helping European and US tech firms scale, internationalise, and access capital markets.

Name: 2026 Season/Off Cycle Internship
Company Description: Goldman Sachs is one of the world’s most prestigious investment banks and financial institutions, offering a wide range of services in investment banking, asset management, global markets, consumer banking, and wealth management. Founded in 1869 and headquartered in New York, the firm serves corporations, financial institutions, governments, and individuals globally. Goldman is widely regarded for its M&A advisory, equity and debt underwriting, and institutional trading, and has been involved in many of the largest and most complex financial transactions in history. It also operates Marcus, its consumer banking platform, and has expanded into transaction banking and alternative investments. Known for its elite talent, risk culture, and thought leadership, Goldman Sachs is also increasingly focused on sustainability, digital finance, and private capital markets. It plays a key role in shaping financial innovation and global capital flows.

Name: 2026 Private Equity H2 Off Cycle Internship
Company Description: Blackstone is one of the world’s leading investment firms, specialising in private equity, real estate, credit, and infrastructure. Founded in 1985 and based in New York, the firm manages capital on behalf of pension funds, sovereign wealth funds, and individual investors. Blackstone is known for its scale, global reach, and ability to take large, complex positions across industries. It combines deep operational support with financial engineering and has a track record of building value in both private and public market investments.

Name: 2026 Off-cycle Internship - Risk Management
Company Description: Morgan Stanley is a global financial services firm headquartered in New York, offering investment banking, wealth management, institutional securities, and asset management services. With a strong presence in both the US and international markets, the firm advises clients on mergers and acquisitions, IPOs, debt and equity financing, and strategic investments. Its institutional arm is active in trading, research, and capital markets, while its wealth management division, bolstered by the acquisition of E*TRADE, serves millions of clients globally. Morgan Stanley is widely regarded for its advisory work with corporates and financial sponsors, and it continues to invest in digital platforms, sustainability, and global expansion to maintain its position as one of the world’s top financial institutions.

Name: Intern, Private Capital Sustainability
Company Description: EQT is a global investment firm based in Stockholm, managing capital across private equity, infrastructure, real estate, and venture strategies. Founded in 1994, EQT has grown into one of Europe’s largest and most active private markets investors, with a strong presence in North America and Asia. The firm is known for its thematic investment approach and hands-on value creation, often deploying digital tools like EQT’s proprietary Motherbrain AI platform to support decision-making and operational improvements in portfolio companies. EQT places a strong emphasis on sustainability and impact, integrating ESG principles throughout the investment lifecycle. Its portfolio spans healthcare, technology, energy transition, and consumer sectors. EQT also manages purpose-driven capital through EQT Foundation, and continues to be a driving force in shaping modern private equity practices through innovation, scale, and stakeholder alignment.

Name: Emerging Talent – Finance 2026 Opportunities
Company Description: Baker Hughes is a leading energy technology company that provides integrated solutions for the energy and industrial sectors. Headquartered in Houston and operating in over 120 countries, the firm offers products and services across oilfield services, energy equipment, and digital solutions. Baker Hughes focuses on improving efficiency, reducing emissions, and advancing the energy transition through innovation in AI, industrial software, and clean technologies such as carbon capture and hydrogen. It is known for its engineering excellence, global scale, and commitment to a sustainable energy future.

Name: Quantitative Analyst Internship
Company Description: Energy Aspects is a global research consultancy that provides independent analysis and data on energy markets. Founded in 2012 and headquartered in London, the firm specializes in oil, natural gas, and refined product market intelligence. It serves a diverse range of clients including financial institutions, trading houses, and governments. The company is known for its rigorous fundamental data modeling and its ability to provide actionable insights into the supply and demand dynamics of complex energy commodities.

Name: Off-Cycle Internship, Venture Capital, 2027
Company Description: Macquarie Group is a global financial services firm headquartered in Sydney, Australia, offering services across asset management, banking, commodities, and capital markets. Known for its entrepreneurial culture and decentralised structure, Macquarie operates through specialised groups that manage infrastructure, green energy, real estate, and credit investments worldwide. It is one of the world’s largest infrastructure asset managers and a major player in commodity trading and energy finance. The firm’s global advisory and capital markets division supports clients with M&A, equity, and debt financing, often with a focus on complex or cross-border transactions. Macquarie has expanded significantly in Europe and North America and is recognised for combining risk discipline with innovation across sectors including renewables, tech, and transportation.

Name: Internship Program
Company Description: Blackwood Capital is a private investment firm focused on acquiring and growing established businesses in partnership with management. The firm typically targets companies with strong market positions, defensible niches, and opportunities for operational improvement. Blackwood provides capital, strategic guidance, and operational resources to help its portfolio companies achieve long-term growth and profitability. Based in the United States, the firm invests across a variety of industries, often focusing on sectors undergoing transformation or consolidation.
Notes: Apply by sending CV and a cover letter with subject ''M&A Internship'' to careers@blackwoodcapital.com

Name: Internship - Tikehau Special Opportunities (TSO)
Company Description: Tikehau Capital is a Paris-based alternative asset manager investing across private debt, real estate, private equity, and capital markets strategies. The firm manages over €40 billion in assets and is known for backing entrepreneurs and businesses across Europe with flexible, long-term capital. Tikehau blends institutional-grade investment with a strong entrepreneurial culture and takes an active approach to value creation across its portfolio. With offices in key financial centres and a growing international presence, the firm is also focused on responsible investment and integrating ESG principles into its strategy.

Name: Responsible Investment Internship 2026
Company Description: IK Partners is a European private equity firm focused on investing in mid-market companies across the business services, healthcare, consumer, and industrials sectors. Headquartered in Luxembourg with offices across key European cities, the firm operates several funds targeting different regions and strategies, including development capital and small-cap buyouts. IK takes a hands-on approach to value creation, supporting portfolio companies through operational improvement, digital transformation, and international growth. The firm is known for its strong local networks and sector specialisation, which help it source proprietary deals and deliver consistent performance. IK Partners maintains a collaborative partnership model and has a long-standing commitment to responsible investing, integrating ESG considerations into its investment process and actively engaging with management teams on sustainability and governance.

Name: Intern
Company Description: Cairneagle is a boutique strategy consulting firm based in London, specialising in the education sector. The firm advises schools, universities, investors, and education providers on growth strategy, transactions, market entry, and operational improvement. Cairneagle combines deep sector knowledge with commercial insight, supporting clients across early years, K-12, higher education, and edtech. It is recognised for its ability to bring strategic clarity to a highly regulated and fast-changing industry.

Name: Private Equity Internship
Company Description: Triton is a European private equity firm that invests in mid-market companies across industrials, healthcare, services, and consumer sectors. Headquartered in Germany with offices across Northern Europe, Triton typically targets businesses with strong regional footprints and potential for operational improvement. The firm works closely with management teams to drive transformation, expand internationally, or implement strategic change. It is known for its long-term approach, with an emphasis on sustainability, digitalisation, and value creation through hands-on ownership.

Name: Intern - Quantitative Risk Analytics
Company Description: The European Bank for Reconstruction and Development is a multilateral development finance institution. Founded in 1991, it invests in projects that promote market oriented economies and private and entrepreneurial initiative in countries from central Europe to central Asia. The EBRD is owned by 71 countries as well as the EU and the EIB. It offers project financing for banks, industries and businesses, both new ventures and investments in existing companies.

Name: Global Investment Banking - M&A Internship (6 months)
Company Description: Baird is a US-based financial services firm offering investment banking, wealth management, asset management, and equity research. Founded in 1919 and headquartered in Milwaukee, Baird is employee-owned and operates with a focus on long-term client relationships. Its investment banking division serves middle-market clients across M&A, capital raising, and financial advisory, while its wealth and asset management arms support individuals and institutions. Baird is known for its collaborative culture, stability, and strong reputation in both advisory and investing services.

Name: Corporate Lending (IB&F) Internship
Company Description: Banco Bilbao Vizcaya Argentaria (BBVA) is a multinational banking group headquartered in Spain, with a strong presence across Latin America, the US, and Europe. Formed in 1999 through a merger of long-established Spanish banks, BBVA offers services in retail banking, corporate finance, asset management, and digital banking. It has been a leader in banking digitalisation and sustainability-linked finance, particularly in emerging markets. BBVA supports a wide client base including individuals, SMEs, and large corporates.

Name: Visiting Analyst (Investment Team Intern)
Company Description: DN Capital is a global venture capital firm that focuses on early stage investments in software, fintech, ecommerce, and digital media companies. Founded in 2000, the firm has offices in London, Berlin, and San Francisco. DN Capital seeks companies with the potential to scale globally and often invests in rounds alongside other venture firms. The firm provides portfolio companies with operational support and access to its international network.

Name: Financial Analyst Intern
Company Description: Amazon is a global technology company operating across e-commerce, cloud computing, digital streaming, and AI. Founded by Jeff Bezos in 1994, it started as an online bookstore and evolved into one of the most influential companies of the digital era. Amazon’s retail platform spans hundreds of millions of products and global markets, while Amazon Web Services (AWS) dominates the cloud infrastructure space. The company also operates in logistics, media, and smart devices, with a business model built on scale, innovation, and customer reach.

Name: Private Equity Intern
Company Description: Estari Group is a technology and investment firm that focuses on the development of blockchain infrastructure and decentralized technologies. Based in London, the company specializes in venture building, strategic advisory, and capital allocation within the digital asset ecosystem. Estari Group is known for its technical expertise and its commitment to fostering innovation in areas such as scalability, interoperability, and decentralized finance. The firm works to bridge the gap between traditional enterprise requirements and emerging blockchain solutions through long term partnerships and targeted investments.

Name: Business Analyst (6-Month Fixed-Term Contract)
Company Description: LSS Strategic Partners is a specialized consultancy firm that provides expert advisory, investment banking, and strategic support to legal organizations and professional service businesses. Operating within the legal services sector, the firm focuses on mergers and acquisitions, business development, and operational efficiency for law firms and legal service providers. SHP Legal Services functions as a dedicated component or partner focused on the practical implementation of legal support, case management, and administrative services. Together, these entities work to bridge the gap between high level corporate strategy and the day to day execution of legal practice requirements. They are recognized for their industry specific knowledge and their role in helping legal entities navigate complex business transformations and growth initiatives.

Name: 2026 Off Cycle Internship - European Real Estate Debt
Company Description: Morgan Stanley is a global financial services firm headquartered in New York, offering investment banking, wealth management, institutional securities, and asset management services. With a strong presence in both the US and international markets, the firm advises clients on mergers and acquisitions, IPOs, debt and equity financing, and strategic investments. Its institutional arm is active in trading, research, and capital markets, while its wealth management division, bolstered by the acquisition of E*TRADE, serves millions of clients globally. Morgan Stanley is widely regarded for its advisory work with corporates and financial sponsors, and it continues to invest in digital platforms, sustainability, and global expansion to maintain its position as one of the world’s top financial institutions.

Name: Mergers and Acquisitions Intern
Company Description: Royal Park Partners is a London-based corporate finance advisory firm focused exclusively on the FinTech sector. Founded in 2019, the firm helps high-growth FinTech companies with capital raising, M&A, IPO advisory, and strategic exits. Royal Park Partners has built a reputation for combining deep industry insight, strong investor networks, and fast execution to support founders, entrepreneurs, and investors across EMEA and increasingly in the Americas.

Name: Intern | ESG
Company Description: DTCP (Deutsche Telekom Capital Partners) is a European investment platform focused on digital infrastructure, growth equity, and venture capital. Based in Hamburg and supported by Deutsche Telekom, the firm invests in cloud computing, software, connectivity, and cybersecurity companies across Europe, North America, and Israel. DTCP provides both financial capital and strategic guidance, often helping portfolio companies navigate partnerships with telecom operators and large corporates. It plays a unique role in bridging corporate and venture ecosystems.

Name: M&A Analyst Internship
Company Description: BDA Partners is an international investment banking advisory firm focused on cross-border transactions involving Asia. Headquartered in Hong Kong with offices in North America, Europe, and across Asia, BDA advises clients on mergers, acquisitions, divestitures, and capital raising. The firm works with multinationals, private equity funds, and family-owned businesses, often facilitating inbound and outbound deals between Asia and the rest of the world. Its strength lies in mid-market transactions, sector expertise, and regional connectivity.

Name: M&A Intern
Company Description: iwoca provides small business loans and revenue based financing. Based in the UK, the fintech company offers access to fast, flexible funding for businesses underserved by traditional lenders. iwoca uses technology and data analytics to streamline the application process and provide credit decisions quickly. It aims to empower small businesses by providing access to the capital they need to grow and thrive.

Name: Later Stage Investments - Visiting Analyst
Company Description: T.Capital is the corporate venture capital arm of Deutsche Telekom. They invest both early-stage and growth-stage capital in technology companies across Europe, Israel, and North America. Their focus includes infrastructure, enterprise software, connectivity, marketplaces, telecom, and adjacent verticals. T.Capital not only funds businesses but also helps with partnerships, integrations, and strategic value creation with Deutsche Telekom.

Name: 2027 London Financial Advisory Off-Cycle Internship
Company Description: Lazard is a global financial advisory and asset management firm known for its independent, client-centric approach to M&A, restructuring, capital markets, and investment strategy. Headquartered in New York and Paris, the firm operates across more than 40 countries and serves corporations, governments, and institutional investors. Lazard’s financial advisory division is one of the most prestigious in the world, regularly advising on complex, high-value transactions, activist defence, and strategic reviews. Its asset management arm offers a broad range of strategies across equities, fixed income, and alternatives, with a strong presence in fundamental research and emerging markets. With roots dating back to the 19th century, Lazard is known for its discretion, deep bench of senior advisers, and emphasis on long-term client relationships across sectors and regions.

Name: 2026 Credit Management Long-Term Internship
Company Description: Five Arrows is the private equity arm of Rothschild & Co, managing a suite of funds that invest across growth equity, mid-cap buyouts, and credit. Operating under Five Arrows Principal Investments (FAPI) and Five Arrows Growth Capital (FAGC), the firm targets businesses with strong market positions, recurring revenues, and international growth potential—particularly in healthcare, data, technology, and business services. With offices in London, Paris, New York, and Luxembourg, Five Arrows brings a long-term, partnership-led approach to value creation, often working closely with management teams to support operational scaling, internationalisation, and digital transformation. It benefits from Rothschild’s deep network and sector insight while maintaining a focused, independent investment strategy.

Name: 2026 Investment Banking Analyst Intern – Financial Sponsors Group
Company Description: Guggenheim Partners is a diversified global financial services firm offering investment management, investment banking, and insurance services, with over $300 billion in assets under management. Headquartered in New York and Chicago, Guggenheim serves institutional clients including pension funds, insurance companies, sovereign wealth funds, and governments. It is particularly known for its strength in fixed income and structured credit, and for developing innovative solutions in areas like infrastructure financing and private placements. Its investment banking division, Guggenheim Securities, provides M&A and capital markets advisory with a strong presence in healthcare, tech, and media. The firm combines a long-term, research-led investment philosophy with a flexible capital approach, and continues to expand its reach into alternative investments and sustainable finance.

Name: Fund Finance Intern
Company Description: Ardian is a private investment house headquartered in Paris, managing assets across private equity, infrastructure, real estate, and private credit. Originally founded in 1996 as the private equity arm of AXA, it became independent in 2013 and has since grown into one of Europe’s largest private markets investors. Ardian operates through a network of offices worldwide and backs businesses at multiple stages, from buyouts to growth investments. The firm is also active in secondaries and co-investments and has built a strong reputation around investor alignment and ESG integration.

Name: 2026 and 2027 Off-cycle Internship, Infrastructure Advisory
Company Description: Macquarie Group is a global financial services firm headquartered in Sydney, Australia, offering services across asset management, banking, commodities, and capital markets. Known for its entrepreneurial culture and decentralised structure, Macquarie operates through specialised groups that manage infrastructure, green energy, real estate, and credit investments worldwide. It is one of the world’s largest infrastructure asset managers and a major player in commodity trading and energy finance. The firm’s global advisory and capital markets division supports clients with M&A, equity, and debt financing, often with a focus on complex or cross-border transactions. Macquarie has expanded significantly in Europe and North America and is recognised for combining risk discipline with innovation across sectors including renewables, tech, and transportation.

Name: 2026 Off-Cycle Analyst - Strategic Advisory Capital Markets
Company Description: PJT Partners is a global advisory-focused investment bank, formed as a spin-off from Blackstone in 2015. Headquartered in New York, the firm provides strategic advisory services in M&A, restructuring, and capital markets to corporates, governments, and institutional investors. It is particularly known for its strong presence in complex financial restructurings and special situations, having advised on many of the largest corporate bankruptcies and recapitalisations globally. PJT also operates a capital raising platform, Park Hill, which advises alternative asset managers on fundraising and secondary transactions. With a senior-led, conflict-free model, PJT competes with larger banks by offering high-touch, independent advice in critical, high-stakes mandates.

Name: Asset Management Analyst – 6 Month Internship
Company Description: Platform_ is a UK-based brand experience agency specialising in digital and physical event design, creative strategy, and immersive storytelling for businesses and cultural institutions. The firm works with clients to deliver high-impact experiences across brand activations, installations, and exhibitions, often blending creative design with interactive technology. Platform_ supports global brands across retail, tech, and fashion, helping them build deeper engagement through custom-built environments and campaigns. Known for its collaborative process and multidisciplinary team, the agency operates at the intersection of design, technology, and culture.

Name: 6-month Internship - Accounting & Finance
Company Description: Tower Peak Partners is a boutique advisory firm providing strategic and financial counsel to companies in the consumer, healthcare, and technology sectors. Based in New York, the firm focuses on M&A, capital raising, and growth strategy, often working with founder-led or sponsor-backed businesses. Tower Peak operates with a hands-on, relationship-based model and a relatively low profile, positioning itself as a trusted adviser in competitive mid-market transactions. Its team brings experience from top-tier banks and combines execution skill with sector depth.

Name: Intern - Quantitative Research, Fixed Income and Credit (12 months)
Company Description: Natixis is a French financial services firm and part of Groupe BPCE, offering a wide range of services in corporate and investment banking, asset and wealth management, insurance, and payments. Headquartered in Paris, the firm supports clients globally with structured finance, M&A advisory, capital markets access, and risk management solutions. Natixis is particularly active in sectors like infrastructure, energy, and real estate, and is known for its expertise in sustainable finance and ESG-linked products. It has a strong European footprint and continues to grow internationally, with an emphasis on integrated, client-led solutions.

Name: Internship | Opportunistic Credit
Company Description: BTG Pactual is a leading Latin American investment bank and asset manager, headquartered in São Paulo with offices across the Americas, Europe, and the Middle East. Founded in 1983, the firm offers services in investment banking, wealth management, asset management, and lending. It serves corporate, institutional, and high-net-worth clients, and has become a major force in the Brazilian financial market. BTG Pactual is known for its entrepreneurial culture, capital markets expertise, and strong presence in emerging markets.

Name: M&A FIG Internship - Fluent in French ​
Company Description: Mediobanca is an Italian investment bank headquartered in Milan, offering services in corporate finance, capital markets, wealth management, and consumer banking. Founded in 1946, the firm has long played a central role in Italy’s post-war economic development and maintains strong relationships with large Italian corporates and family-owned businesses. Mediobanca operates across advisory, equity and debt underwriting, private banking (through its subsidiary CheBanca!), and consumer finance (via Compass). In recent years, the firm has expanded its international footprint and shifted toward more recurring revenue streams, including asset and wealth management. It remains a key player in Southern European financial markets and an influential institution within Italy’s banking sector.

Name: Internship London Fall 2026
Company Description: Nordic Capital is a Northern European private equity firm investing in mid- to large-cap companies across healthcare, technology, financial services, and industrials. Headquartered in Stockholm, the firm focuses on businesses with strong market positions and growth potential, supporting them through international expansion, digitalisation, and operational improvement. Nordic Capital has built a reputation for its active ownership model and sector specialisation, often partnering with management teams to deliver transformational change. The firm also integrates ESG principles into its investment process and has a strong track record of value creation across cycles.

Company Description: Valsoft Corporation is a Toronto-based software acquisition and management company focused on acquiring and growing vertical market software businesses. Founded in 2014, Valsoft takes a long-term, operationally intensive approach to investing in niche software companies serving specialized industries such as healthcare, manufacturing, real estate, and logistics. The firm partners closely with management teams to drive growth through technology innovation, operational improvements, and market expansion. Valsoft’s decentralized model empowers its portfolio companies to maintain entrepreneurial agility while benefiting from shared resources and strategic guidance. Known for its disciplined acquisition strategy and deep sector expertise, Valsoft aims to build a diversified platform of high-quality software businesses with strong recurring revenues. The company emphasizes sustainable growth, customer-centric solutions, and technology-driven value creation.

Company Description: Natixis is a French financial services firm and part of Groupe BPCE, offering a wide range of services in corporate and investment banking, asset and wealth management, insurance, and payments. Company Description: AXA Investment Managers is a global asset management firm within the AXA Group, managing portfolios across fixed income, equities, real estate, and alternative assets. It combines financial analysis with ESG integration, offering both traditional and thematic investment solutions.

Company Description: Jefferies is a global investment banking and capital markets firm headquartered in New York, offering services in M&A advisory, equity and debt underwriting, research, and trading. The firm is known for its focus on the mid to upper mid-market, serving corporate clients, financial sponsors, and institutional investors across a wide range of industries. Jefferies operates with a full-service model that includes strong sector coverage, global distribution, and a growing footprint in Europe and Asia. It is particularly active in healthcare, industrials, TMT, and consumer, and is regarded as one of the top independent investment banks outside the bulge bracket. Jefferies has also expanded into asset and wealth management, and its flexible, entrepreneurial culture allows it to move quickly in competitive deal environments. With a reputation for high-touch client service and deal execution, it remains a go-to firm for high-growth companies and active sponsors.

Name: Quantitative Modeling Intern
Company Description: ExodusPoint Capital Management is a multi-strategy hedge fund based in New York, founded in 2017 by former executives from Millennium Management. The firm manages capital across a wide range of strategies including equities, credit, macro, and quantitative investing, operating with a multi-manager, platform-style model. It has quickly grown into one of the largest hedge fund launches in history, with billions in assets under management and a global footprint spanning North America, Europe, and Asia. ExodusPoint is structured around independent portfolio managers who operate semi-autonomously, supported by a centralised infrastructure covering technology, compliance, and risk. The firm is known for its selective recruitment of top-tier investment talent and its focus on leveraging technology and data science to enhance execution and research. It competes at the highest level of the hedge fund industry, alongside firms like Citadel, Point72, and Millennium.

Name: Investment Banking Intern
Company Description: National Bank of Canada is a Canadian bank and financial services provider. Headquartered in Montreal, it is the sixth largest bank in Canada and provides a range of banking, investment, and insurance services to individuals, businesses, and institutions. It operates through a network of branches and offices across Canada, with a focus on the province of Quebec. The bank emphasizes its commitment to supporting local communities and fostering economic growth through its financial products and services.

It primarily serves clients in the Netherlands but also has a presence internationally, especially in Northwest Europe. ABN AMRO is known for its focus on sustainability, digital innovation, and responsible banking.

Access Capital Partners differentiates itself through its local presence in several European countries, which allows for close collaboration with management teams. The firm aims to create value by supporting organic growth, international expansion, and operational improvements within its portfolio companies.

The firm operates with a focus on electronic trading infrastructure and high-frequency strategies to capture opportunities in volatile market environments. It maintains a reputation for its technical expertise and its ability to provide consistent market depth across a wide range of asset classes and financial instruments.

Company Description: Public Sector Pension Investment Board (PSP Investments) is one of Canada’s largest pension investment managers, overseeing over C$200 billion in assets for federal public service employees, the Canadian Forces, and the Royal Canadian Mounted Police. Headquartered in Montreal, with global offices in London, New York, and Hong Kong, PSP invests across public equities, private equity, infrastructure, credit, natural resources, and real estate. The organisation takes a long-term, active approach, often pursuing direct and co-investment opportunities. PSP is known for its global diversification, in-house expertise, and focus on responsible investing and climate-related financial risk.

Name: Private Equity Off-Cycle Internship (January 2027)
Company Description: Mubadala Capital is the asset management arm of Mubadala Investment Company, the Abu Dhabi sovereign wealth fund, managing third-party capital alongside its proprietary balance sheet. The firm invests across private equity, public equities, venture capital, and credit, with offices in Abu Dhabi, New York, London, Rio de Janeiro, and San Francisco. Mubadala Capital takes a thematic and long-term investment approach, focusing on sectors such as media, tech, energy, financial services, and mobility. It operates both fund and direct investment strategies and has a strong reputation for global partnerships and disciplined capital deployment. As one of the few sovereign wealth fund affiliates to manage external capital, it plays a growing role in the global alternatives market.

Name: 2026 Tactical Opportunities H2 Off Cycle Internship
Company Description: Blackstone is one of the world’s leading investment firms, specialising in private equity, real estate, credit, and infrastructure. Founded in 1985 and based in New York, the firm manages capital on behalf of pension funds, sovereign wealth funds, and individual investors. Blackstone is known for its scale, global reach, and ability to take large, complex positions across industries. It combines deep operational support with financial engineering and has a track record of building value in both private and public market investments.

Name: Later Stage Investments - Visiting Analyst
Company Description: T.Capital is the corporate venture capital arm of Deutsche Telekom. They invest both early-stage and growth-stage capital in technology companies across Europe, Israel, and North America. Their focus includes infrastructure, enterprise software, connectivity, marketplaces, telecom, and adjacent verticals. T.Capital not only funds businesses but also helps with partnerships, integrations, and strategic value creation with Deutsche Telekom.

Name: Private Credit Intern - September 2026
Company Description: Ardian is a private investment house headquartered in Paris, managing assets across private equity, infrastructure, real estate, and private credit. Originally founded in 1996 as the private equity arm of AXA, it became independent in 2013 and has since grown into one of Europe’s largest private markets investors. Ardian operates through a network of offices worldwide and backs businesses at multiple stages, from buyouts to growth investments. The firm is also active in secondaries and co-investments and has built a strong reputation around investor alignment and ESG integration.

Name: Private Equity Analyst Intern
Company Description: Tioopo Capital is a UK-based private equity firm founded in 2021, specializing in investing in highly profitable small and medium-sized enterprises across France and the UK, with a focus on niche markets such as luxury goods, specialist manufacturing, and healthcare. The firm distinguishes itself through a hands-on approach, working closely with management teams to provide both capital and operational expertise that unlock growth opportunities and enhance long-term value. Backed by multi-family investors and with its co-founders investing alongside limited partners, Tioopo aligns its interests with those of its stakeholders. Its inaugural fund, Tioopo TP1, has already attracted strong investor confidence, raising over €30 million within its first two months.

Name: M&A Internship 2026
Company Description: Carlsquare is a partner-led investment bank specialising in M&A advisory for growth companies and mid-sized corporates. Headquartered in Hamburg with offices across Europe, the firm advises on sell-side, buy-side, and capital raise transactions, particularly in technology, industrials, and consumer sectors. Carlsquare works closely with entrepreneurs, investors, and strategic buyers, often in cross-border contexts. Its approach blends corporate finance expertise with a strong understanding of founder-led businesses and innovation-driven markets.

Name: Intern Energy Transition
Company Description: Akereos Capital is a venture capital firm focused on investments in the healthcare sector. The firm targets early stage companies developing innovative therapeutics, medical devices, and diagnostics. Akereos provides capital and expertise to support companies through critical milestones, such as preclinical development, clinical trials, and regulatory approval. The firm looks for opportunities where it can leverage its network and experience to help build successful healthcare businesses.

Name: Co-Investment Intern - September 2026
Company Description: Ardian is a private investment house headquartered in Paris, managing assets across private equity, infrastructure, real estate, and private credit. Originally founded in 1996 as the private equity arm of AXA, it became independent in 2013 and has since grown into one of Europe’s largest private markets investors. Ardian operates through a network of offices worldwide and backs businesses at multiple stages, from buyouts to growth investments. The firm is also active in secondaries and co-investments and has built a strong reputation around investor alignment and ESG integration.

Name: Liquid Credit Intern
Company Description: Partners Group is a Swiss-based private markets investment manager with global reach, managing capital across private equity, private debt, real estate, and infrastructure. The firm serves institutional investors, sovereign wealth funds, and family offices, offering both direct and fund-of-fund strategies. Known for its global platform and thematic investment approach, Partners Group identifies long-term trends—such as digitisation, decarbonisation, and demographic shifts—and invests in businesses that are positioned to benefit. The firm has a strong operational focus and often partners with portfolio companies to support scaling, sustainability, and value creation initiatives. It is headquartered in Zug, Switzerland, with offices across Europe, the Americas, and Asia-Pacific.

Name: Intern, Mergers & Acquisitons
Company Description: Kroll is a global risk and financial advisory firm headquartered in New York, providing services in investigations, compliance, cyber security, valuations, and corporate finance. Known historically for its forensic investigations and intelligence gathering, Kroll has evolved into a multidisciplinary adviser for clients navigating fraud, litigation, governance, and data risk. The firm supports corporates, governments, law firms, and financial institutions in managing reputational, operational, and financial challenges, often in high-stakes or crisis scenarios. Kroll also operates as a major provider of independent valuation and fairness opinions for transactions, tax reporting, and litigation support. With a growing presence in cyber defence and ESG advisory, Kroll continues to expand its offerings at the intersection of technology, finance, and security.

Name: Quantitative Researcher (Intern)
Company Description: MerQube is a financial technology company specializing in index calculation and data management for the global financial industry. Founded in 2019 and based in Palo Alto, California, the firm provides a cloud native, scalable platform that allows financial institutions to design, backtest, and calculate highly customizable indices. MerQube's technology supports a wide range of asset classes and complex methodologies, serving banks, asset managers, and index providers. It is known for its speed, flexibility, and ability to handle large volumes of data, enabling clients to bring innovative investment products to market efficiently.

Name: Intern
Company Description: The European Bank for Reconstruction and Development is a multilateral development finance institution. Founded in 1991, it invests in projects that promote market oriented economies and private and entrepreneurial initiative in countries from central Europe to central Asia. The EBRD is owned by 71 countries as well as the EU and the EIB. It offers project financing for banks, industries and businesses, both new ventures and investments in existing companies.

Name: Investment | Internship | London
Company Description: Antin Infrastructure Partners is a leading independent private equity firm focused on infrastructure investments. With several funds raised since its inception, Antin targets investments in energy, transportation, telecom, and social infrastructure sectors. Headquartered in Paris, the firm primarily invests in developed markets across Europe, North America, and Asia-Pacific. Antin aims to create long-term value through active portfolio management and operational improvements in essential infrastructure assets.
